title: Get AdCP Capabilities Request
description: Request payload for get_adcp_capabilities task. Protocol-level capability discovery that works across all AdCP protocols.

adcp_major_version.description: The AdCP major version the buyer's payloads conform to. When provided, the seller validates this against its supported major_versions and returns VERSION_UNSUPPORTED if the version is not in range. When omitted, the seller assumes the highest major version it supports.

protocols.description: Specific protocols to query capabilities for. If omitted, returns capabilities for all supported protocols.
